Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 052. Collecting, Weighing, and Distributing Gold (ABL 1458)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

a-na LUGAL be-[lí-ia]

(1) To the king, my lord: your servant Ṭab-šar-Aššur. Good health to the king, my lord!

o 22

ARAD-ka mDÙG.GA—IM—d[aš-šur]

o 33

lu DI-mu a-na LUGAL be-lí-[ia]

o 44

ina UGU KUG.GI an-ni-e ša LUGAL be*-⸢lí*⸣ [iš-pur-an-ni]

(4) As to this gold of which the king wrote to me: "Why did you give it? [......] of [......],"

o 55

ma-a a-ta-a ta-ad-din* ⸢ma⸣-a* ⸢ša*⸣ [x x x x x]

o 66

an-ni-ú [x x x x x x x x x x x x]

(6) this [......] 11 talents [......] alone [......] to the king [......

o 77

11 GÚ.UN [x x x x x x x x x x x x]

o 88

ú-di-šú [x x x x x x x x x x x x]

o 99

ina UGU LUGAL [x x x x x x x x x]

rest broken away

(Break)

Reverse
rr beginning broken away

r 1'1'

ša ⸢LUGAL⸣ [x x x x x x x x x x x x x]

(r 1) of the king [......] one shekel from the išk[āru] dues [......]. They have weighed it in my presence but have not yet received it.

r 2'2'

01 GÍN TAv ŠÀ ⸢ÉŠ*.QAR*⸣ [x x x x x]

r 3'3'

ina pa-na-tu-ia iḫ-ti-ṭu ú-⸢di⸣-[ni x x x]

r 4'4'

la i*-ma*-ḫu-ru re-eḫ-ti KUG.GI [x x x x x x]

(r 4) We have not [yet] received the rest of the gold [from PN]. He has returned one mina of the yield of wool (retrieved) from the son of [Kenî], but [... minas] of the gold is still [outstanding].

r 5'5'

la ⸢ni*⸣-ma*-ḫar gi-zu-tú ša TAv IGI ⸢DUMU⸣ [mx x x x x]

r 6'6'

01 MA TAv ŠÀ ú-sa-ḫi-ir a-na ḫur [x x x x x x]

r 7'7'

KUG.GI re-ḫe 1/2 MA KUG.UD ša* ⸢la* x⸣+[x x x x x x]

(r 7) Half a mina of silver [......] without [...]; the son of Kenî told me: "[.......]; nobody should [......

r 8'8'

DUMU mGIN-i iq-ṭí-bi-a ma-[a x x x x x x]

r 9'9'

ma-a me-me-ni ina UGU-⸢ḫi*⸣ lu ⸢la⸣ [x x x x x x x x]

r 10'10'

LUGAL be-lí-ia ⸢x⸣+[x x x x x x x x x]

r 11'11'

SUM-an ši ⸢x⸣+[x x x x x x x x x x]

r 12'12'

a-na-⸢ku⸣ [x x x x x x x x x x x]

Right
r.e. 13r.e. 13

DINGIR-⸢MEŠ⸣ [x x x x x x x x]

r.e. 1414

lu la [x x x x x x x x x]

r.e. 1515

na-[x x x x x x x x x x]

(Rest broken or untranslatable)

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334918/.
